expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: REPORT_STATE and resume semantics remain stable
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers "REPORT_STATE classification" and "resume/refresh/reuse semantics stability" and lists the REPORT_STATE enumeration (FINAL_EXISTS, DRAFT_EXISTS, CONTEXT_ONLY, FRESH) plus deterministic routing via mandatory `scripts/apply_user_choice.sh <mode> <feature-id> <run-dir>` (e.g., "smart_refresh → proceed from Phase 2", "full_regenerate → rerun Phase 0", "reuse/resume → continue"). execution_notes.md also states: "Verified `REPORT_STATE` enumeration and meaning exists and is explicit" and "Verified ... stable routing semantics".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase0
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md state the evaluation is phase0-only: execution_notes.md: "Checks performed (phase0 only; phase-contract focus)"; result.md: "This benchmark checks the phase0 phase-contract" and bases evidence on phase0 contract artifacts (Phase0 outputs under context/ from SKILL.md) and phase0-related scripts (`scripts/phase0.sh`, `scripts/apply_user_choice.sh`).
